narrative:
Precinct Center North (precinct in Williams County) has 1,177 registered voters, with 49.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.8 percentage points.
